query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `white_label_settings` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`appName` varchar(255) DEFAULT 'LuxEstate',
	`appTagline` varchar(500),
	`logoUrl` text,
	`faviconUrl` text,
	`primaryColor` varchar(7) DEFAULT '#C9A962',
	`secondaryColor` varchar(7) DEFAULT '#1a1a1a',
	`accentColor` varchar(7) DEFAULT '#C9A962',
	`customDomain` varchar(255),
	`customCss` text,
	`hideOriginalBranding` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`supportEmail` varchar(320),
	`supportPhone` varchar(20),
	`termsUrl` text,
	`privacyUrl` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `white_label_settings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `white_label_settings_userId_unique` UNIQUE(`userId`)
);
